description_long: This is a dark blue Audi hatchback car with a sleek, modern design and a streamlined body. The vehicle features four passenger doors and a rear hatch door, with silver trim accentuating the windows and roof rails. The front grille is distinctively Audi, with a prominent badge and angular headlights. The wheels are large, multi-spoke alloys, and the side mirrors are finished in a metallic silver. The rear of the car displays the Audi logo and model badge, with elongated taillights and a subtle roof spoiler. The windows are lightly tinted, and the overall build suggests a premium, urban-oriented family vehicle.
description: A dark blue Audi hatchback car with silver trim, four doors, a rear hatch, and alloy wheels, featuring a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated body, four doors, silver trim, and alloy wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the Audi grille, badge, angular headlights, and silver side mirrors.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0 with clear visibility of the rear hatch outline.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the Audi logo, model badge, elongated taillights, and rear hatch door.
